nasb.text: When they entered the tent of meeting, and when they approached the altar, they washed, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: When they went into the tent of meeting, and when they approached the altar, they washed, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 每逢他們走進會幕，或是走近祭壇的時候，就要先洗濯；是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 他们进会幕或走近祭坛的时候，都要先清洗，都遵照耶和华的吩咐。
